name: CHURCH & DWIGHT CO INC /DE/
business: Church & Dwight manufactures and markets household and personal care products (laundry detergents, cat litter, baking soda, antiperspirants, condoms, etc.) under brands such as ARM & HAMMER, TROJAN, OXICLEAN, and BATISTE, and also sells specialty products including animal nutrition supplements and industrial sodium bicarbonate.

exposures.sentence: Our Consumer Domestic segment includes each of our seven power brands, as well as other well-known brands and household and personal care products.
Our condoms, lubricants, STERIMAR nasal congestion relief, home pregnancy test kits and WATERPIK professional dental products are regulated as class II devices.
Our specialty chemicals business primarily encompasses the manufacture, marketing and sale of sodium bicarbonate in a range of grades and granulations for use in industrial markets.

Since the ARM & HAMMER Animal Nutrition business began in 1972, with its launch of ARM & HAMMER baking soda as a feed additive to help dairy cows produce more milk, we have built a leading portfolio of nutritional supplements designed to help improve the health and productivity of dairy cows.

catalysts.event: Cash payment of $159.0 million based on 2025 net sales thresholds for Touchland acquisition
catalysts.sentence: The Company paid $656.0 million, net of cash acquired, at closing and entered an agreement to pay an additional amount based on 2025 net sales thresholds which will result in a cash payment of $159.0 million to be paid in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Deferred payment of $5.0 million related to indemnification obligations for Touchland acquisition
catalysts.sentence: Payment of a $5.0 million portion of the purchase price was deferred related to certain indemnification obligations provided by Touchland’s equity holders, which amount, to the extent not used in satisfaction of such indemnity obligations, is payable three years from the closing.
